# v0.1.16

## Highlights

- Added chat-native MCP operations: `/mcp refresh <name>`, `/mcp call <server> <tool> --args "{...}"`, `/mcp enable <name>`, and `/mcp disable <name>`.
- MCP calls made from chat write the same auditable `mcp_call` traces as CLI calls.
- Kept `/mcp` as the quick availability panel while allowing focused subcommands when arguments are provided.

## Verification

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
